title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text:
Selling ebooks from Kenya just got a whole lot easier, thanks to blockchain-based payments that bypass PayPal restrictions and open up new revenue streams for creatives in Africa. PayPal's geographical limitations are notorious, but what if you could accept international payments without going through the platform? Let's dive into the steps to sell ebooks from Kenya with Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, your one-stop-shop for setting up a seamless digital sales experience. No bank account required, no KYC headaches, and no geographical limitations to hold you back. Get ready to unlock your full earning potential as a Kenyan ebook author or digital product creator."

Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Traditional payment methods often fail creators in Africa because of geographical restrictions, banking limitations, or Know-Your-Customer requirements. But with blockchain-based payments, you can accept international payments without going through PayPal, Stripe, or any other middleman. This method works because it's decentralized, allowing you to connect directly with your customers and receive payments in your preferred cryptocurrency. No more worrying about bank account restrictions or KYC requirements holding you back from reaching your audience.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need to set up your digital product store infrastructure using Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle. This comprehensive package includes the Core Engine for automated delivery and payment verification, Wallet Connect for seamless wallet integration, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction logs and order management. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll get lifetime access to priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you get started.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, start by integrating NOWPayments with your digital product store. This payment processor supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, eliminating the need for bank accounts or KYC requirements. Once integrated, you can configure automated delivery for your ebooks and other digital products, ensuring a seamless experience for your customers. With NOWPayments, you'll receive payments instantly, and your customers will receive their ebooks automatically.
You can sell ebooks from Kenya without a PayPal account using blockchain-based payments with Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

To go live and make your first sale, create a new digital product in your Unchained Commerce store and configure the payment settings using NOWPayments. Set a price for your ebook and add a description, then click publish to make it live. Once live, you can share your ebook with your audience through social media, email marketing, or other channels. When a customer buys your ebook, the payment will be processed instantly, and the ebook will be delivered automatically to their wallet.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your digital sales system is up and running, you can scale your operations by adding more digital products, marketing channels, and customer support. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you'll have everything you need to grow your business and reach a wider audience. Monitor your sales and analytics, adjust your marketing strategy, and continually improve your customer experience to stay ahead of the competition.
